originalTitle: The best Memorial Day sales you can shop this weekend
summary: Memorial Day is here, meaning the seasonal sales are in full swing. content: Memorial Day is here, meaning the seasonal sales are in full swing. If your plans over the long weekend involve pool parties or barbecues, now is a great time to pick up a portable speaker or set of solar lights, as many of our favorite models are currently on sale. You can also find deals on everything from 4K OLED TVs and noise-canceling earbuds to tents, laptops, and plenty of our favorite everyday essentials. To give you more options, we’ve also included a selection of deals from retailers that aren’t necessarily running their own Memorial Day sales but are still offering limited-time deals through the remainder of the holiday. Savings are savings, after all. Featured Products Anker Laptop Power Bank Apple 13-inch MacBook Air (M5) SwitchBot Bot Rechargeable Nintendo Switch 2 “Choose Your Game” bundle LifeStraw Peak Series Straw AirPods Pro 3 Govee Table Lamp 2 Pro X Sound by JBL Twelve South AirFly Pro 2 Dyson PencilWash CMF Buds Pro 2 --- In this article --- Earbuds and headphones [Product: AirPods Pro 3 | https://www.amazon.com/Apple-Cancellation-Translation-Headphones-High-Fidelity/dp/B0FQFB8FMG?tag=theverge02-20, https://goto.walmart.com/c/482924/565706/9383?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.walmart.com%2Fip%2FAirPods-nbsp-Pro-nbsp-3%2F17835006350%2F, https://bestbuy.7tiv.net/c/482924/614286/10014?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bestbuy.com%2Fproduct%2Fapple-airpods-pro-3-wireless-active-noise-cancelling-earbuds-with-heart-rate-sensing-feature-white%2FJJGCQLYK5F] [Product: Nothing Headphone A | https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0G6LCC42J/?tag=theverge02-20, https://go.skimresources.com/?id=1025X1701640&xs=1&url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.nothing.tech%2Fproducts%2Fheadphone-a%3FColour%3DBlack] [Product: Bose QuietComfort Ultra Earbuds (2nd Gen) | https://www.amazon.com/Bose-New-QuietComfort-Ultra-Earbuds/dp/B0F7M3HPBD?tag=theverge02-20, https://goto.walmart.com/c/482924/565706/9383?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.walmart.com%2Fip%2FBose-QuietComfort-Ultra-Earbuds-II-Wireless-Noise-Cancelling-Earbuds-White%2F15864510101, https://bestbuy.7tiv.net/c/482924/614286/10014?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bestbuy.com%2Fproduct%2Fbose-quietcomfort-ultra-2nd-gen-true-wireless-noise-cancelling-in-ear-earbuds-black%2FJ7C5V6WCKZ] * Samsung’s Galaxy Buds 3 Pro are on sale for $149.99 ($100 off) at Best Buy, which matches their all-time low price. The wireless earbuds are our top pick for Samsung Galaxy phone device owners, thanks to their comfortable AirPods-inspired design, terrific sound quality, and good noise cancellation. They also offer helpful voice controls that let you adjust volume or playback without a wake word, while delivering excellent voice call quality. Read our review. * If you’re an Apple user, there’s no better pair of starter buds than the open-style AirPods 4, which have fallen to a new low of $99 ($30 off) at Amazon and Walmart. The latest model sounds significantly better than the third-gen pair, particularly for voice calls. More importantly, they offer robust integration with the rest of the Apple ecosystem, letting you take advantage of audio sharing, automatic device switching, hands-free “Hey Siri” commands, Apple TV integration, and more. Read our review. [Product: Shokz OpenRun Pro 2 | https://bestbuy.7tiv.net/c/482924/614286/10014?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bestbuy.com%2Fproduct%2Fshokz-openrun-pro-2-wireless-bone-conduction-open-ear-bluetooth-sports-headphones-steel-blue%2FJ3GWPSGPHG] [Product: Nothing Ear (a) | https://www.amazon.com/Nothing-Ear-Integration-Cancelling-Equaliser/dp/B0CXPRP216/?tag=theverge02-20, https://go.skimresources.com/?id=1025X1701640&xs=1&url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.nothing.tech%2Fproducts%2Fear-a%3FColour%3DBlack] * Sennheiser’s Momentum True Wireless 4 earbuds are down to around $199.95 ($100 off) at Amazon and Best Buy, which is $20 shy of their best price to date. If sound quality matters most, they’re an easy recommendation, delivering rich, detailed audio with EQ customization to fine-tune the listening experience. Optional wing tips are included to help keep them secure and comfortable. Read our review. * Best Buy and Walmart are selling the last-gen AirPods Max (USB-C) for around $449 ($100 off), which is $50 shy of their all-time low. Apple’s luxe over-ear headphones offer a premium design and work especially well with other Apple devices. They still deliver great sound quality and effective noise cancellation, even if the newer model has a slight edge. Read our review. [Product: CMF Buds Pro 2 | https://www.amazon.com/CMF-Buds-Pro-Cancelling-Technology/dp/B0D83J6JJ9/?tag=theverge02-20, https://go.skimresources.com/?id=1025X1701640&xs=1&url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.nothing.tech%2Fproducts%2Fcmf-buds-pro-2%3FColour%3DOrange] [Product: Sony WH-1000XM5 | https://www.amazon.com/Sony-WH-1000XM5-Canceling-Headphones-Hands-Free/dp/B09XS7JWHH/?th=1&tag=theverge02-20, https://bestbuy.7tiv.net/c/482924/614286/10014?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bestbuy.com%2Fproduct%2Fsony-wh-1000xm5-wireless-noise-canceling-over-the-ear-headphones-black%2FJ7XSRH5CXG%2Fsku%2F6505727%2F, https://goto.target.com/c/482924/81938/2092?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.target.com%2Fp%2Fsony-wh-1000xm5-bluetooth-wireless-noise-canceling-headphones-black%2F-%2FA-86314264] Speakers [Product: Sonos Move 2 | https://www.amazon.com/Sonos-Move-Wireless-Portable-Bluetooth/dp/B0CGGYYK2D/?tag=theverge02-20, https://sonos.sjv.io/c/482924/2804767/32256?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.sonos.com%2Fen-us%2Fshop%2Fmove-2, https://bestbuy.7tiv.net/c/482924/614286/10014?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bestbuy.com%2Fproduct%2Fsonos-move-2-portable-durable-smart-speaker-each-black%2FJ39H373KJK] * JBL’s Flip 7 speaker is on sale for $99.95 ($50 off) at Amazon and Best Buy,  which matches its best price to date. The portable Bluetooth speaker builds on the Flip 6 with more durable IP68 dust and water resistance and improved sound that can reach higher volumes without sounding harsh. chineseTitle: 本周末您可以购买的最佳阵亡将士纪念日促销
chineseSummary: 阵亡将士纪念日到了，这意味着季节性销售正如火如荼地进行。如果您的长周末计划涉及泳池派对或烧烤，那么现在是购买便携式扬声器或太阳能灯的好时机，因为我们最喜​​欢的许多型号目前都在打折。您还可以找到优惠 [...]
chineseContent: 阵亡将士纪念日到了，这意味着季节性销售正如火如荼地进行。如果您的长周末计划涉及泳池派对或烧烤，那么现在是购买便携式扬声器或太阳能灯的好时机，因为我们最喜​​欢的许多型号目前都在打折。您还可以找到各种商品的优惠，从 4K OLED 电视和降噪耳机到帐篷、笔记本电脑以及许多我们最喜欢的日常必需品。为了给您提供更多选择，我们还提供了一系列零售商提供的优惠，这些零售商不一定会自己进行阵亡将士纪念日促销，但仍在假期剩余时间内提供限时优惠。毕竟，储蓄就是储蓄。特色产品 Anker 笔记本电脑移动电源 Apple 13 英寸 MacBook Air (M5) SwitchBot Bot 可充电 Nintendo Switch 2“选择您的游戏”捆绑包 LifeStraw Peak 系列吸管 AirPods Pro 3 Govee 台灯 2 Pro X Sound by JBL 十二南 AirFly Pro 2 Dyson PencilWash CMF Buds Pro 2 --- 在本文中 --- 耳塞和耳机 [产品：AirPods Pro 3 | AirPods Pro 2] https://www.amazon.com/Apple-Cancellation-Translation-Headphones-High-Fidelity/dp/B0FQFB8FMG?tag=theverge02-20， https://goto.walmart.com/c/482924/565706/9383?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.walmart.com%2Fip%2FAirPods-nbsp-Pro-nbsp-3%2F17835006350%2F， https://bestbuy.7tiv.net/c/482924/614286/10014?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bestbuy.com%2Fproduct%2Fapple-airpods-pro-3-wireless-active-noise-cancelling-earbuds-with-heart-rate-sensing-feature-white%2FJJGCQLYK5F] [产品：Nothing 耳机 A | https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0G6LCC42J/?tag=theverge02-20，https://go.skimresources.com/?id=1025X1701640&xs=1&url=https%3A%2F%2Fus.nothing.tech%2Fproducts%2Fheadphone-a%3FColour%3DBlack] [产品：Bose QuietComfort Ultra耳塞（第二代）| https://www.amazon.com/Bose-New-QuietComfort-Ultra-Earbuds/
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
